claim_boundary: This contract supervises the eight public global-router command paths through the existing SkillGuard CLI, current artifacts, native checks, a current-authority handoff smoke route, and explicit blocked states. It does not create a second router, execute the selected target skill, prove a live user-level installation without its current work package, prove repository publication, or guarantee future AI behavior.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: Exact target-declared global-router checks only; no selected target skill execution or future AI behavior claim.

functions.business_intent: scan explicit installed or repository-local skill roots
build the global SkillGuard registry from a current skill scan
check global registry schema identity and freshness against its scan roots
render the managed AGENTS prompt projection from the current registry
install or replace only the managed SkillGuard block while preserving unrelated AGENTS content
check managed AGENTS block uniqueness markers and current registry hash
resolve one task to exactly one current skill and hand off to its own route documents
refresh scan registry prompt installation freshness checks and a smoke handoff end to end

portfolio_capability_contracts.business_intent: build the global SkillGuard registry from a current skill scan
check managed AGENTS block uniqueness markers and current registry hash
check global registry schema identity and freshness against its scan roots
install or replace only the managed SkillGuard block while preserving unrelated AGENTS content
refresh scan registry prompt installation freshness checks and a smoke handoff end to end
render the managed AGENTS prompt projection from the current registry
resolve one task to exactly one current skill and hand off to its own route documents
scan explicit installed or repository-local skill roots

action.summary: Run scan-global-skills over every explicitly intended root and write global_router/skill_scan.json.
Reject missing roots, an empty scan, failed scan output, or hidden blockers.
Run build-global-registry from the current scan and write global_router/global_registry.json.
Run the native freshness check and require the router entry to hand off to the exact current generated files.
Run check-global-registry and preserve its current hash-bound JSON report.
Re-run the native registry checker and reject a stale hash or non-current router handoff.
Require the projection registry hash, router id, and managed markers to match.
Run install-global-prompt and change only the managed block in codex_home/AGENTS.md.
Run the native prompt checker and require exactly one current managed block.
Run check-global-prompt and preserve its registry-hash-bound report.
Re-run the native prompt checker and reject missing, duplicate, corrupt, or stale markers.
Run resolve-global-skill for the supplied task and preserve the one-skill routing decision.
Smoke-resolve this router and require its current contract and check manifest in the handoff.
Run refresh-global-router through scan, registry, projection, managed-block installation, freshness checks, and smoke handoff.
Re-run scan, registry, prompt, and current-authority handoff checks over the completed work package.
Validate the portable self-contained FlowGuard export without a source-layout parent dependency.
Run the global-router positive and negative fixture family through the native SkillGuard checker.
